# Translation Glossary - Mezzofy Blog & News Articles

**Version:** 1.0
**Last Updated:** 2026-02-16
**Purpose:** Maintain consistent terminology across all article translations (EN, zh-TW, zh-CN)

---

## Core Terms

| English | Traditional Chinese (zh-TW) | Simplified Chinese (zh-CN) | Notes |
|---------|----------------------------|---------------------------|-------|
| E-coupon | 電子優惠券 | 电子优惠券 | Digital coupon |
| Digital coupon | 數位優惠券 | 数字优惠券 | Same as e-coupon |
| NFC | NFC | NFC | Keep abbreviation |
| NFC tag | NFC 標籤 | NFC 标签 | Physical sticker |
| Redemption rate | 兌換率 | 兑换率 | Percentage of coupons used |
| Purchase intent | 購買意願 | 购买意愿 | Consumer willingness to buy |
| Distribution cost | 分發成本 | 分发成本 | Cost per coupon |
| Merchant | 商家 | 商家 | Business selling goods |
| Retailer | 零售商 | 零售商 | Physical retail store |
| Brand | 品牌 | 品牌 | Product brand |
| Distributor | 經銷商 | 经销商 | Wholesale distributor |
| Protocol | 協議 | 协议 | Technical protocol |
| Marketplace | 市場 | 市场 | Trading platform |
| Wallet | 錢包 | 钱包 | Digital wallet |

## Business Terms

| English | Traditional Chinese (zh-TW) | Simplified Chinese (zh-CN) | Notes |
|---------|----------------------------|---------------------------|-------|
| FMCG | 快速消費品 | 快速消费品 | Fast-moving consumer goods |
| Consumer goods | 消費品 | 消费品 | General consumer products |
| Promotional activity | 促銷活動 | 促销活动 | Marketing campaign |
| One-stop service | 一站式服務 | 一站式服务 | Full-service solution |
| Coordination | 協調 | 协调 | Communication between parties |
| Logistics | 物流 | 物流 | Supply chain management |
| In-store placement | 店內擺放 | 店内摆放 | Product placement in retail |
| Sales data | 銷售數據 | 销售数据 | Transaction metrics |
| Product launch | 產品發布 | 产品发布 | New product introduction |
| Limited-time promotion | 限時促銷 | 限时促销 | Time-limited offer |
| Market testing | 市場測試 | 市场测试 | Test marketing |
| POS | POS | POS | Point of sale |

## Technical Terms

| English | Traditional Chinese (zh-TW) | Simplified Chinese (zh-CN) | Notes |
|---------|----------------------------|---------------------------|-------|
| Tag setup | 標籤設置 | 标签设置 | Configuring NFC tags |
| Coupon creation | 優惠券創建 | 优惠券创建 | Creating digital coupons |
| Platform | 平台 | 平台 | Software platform |
| Infrastructure | 基礎設施 | 基础设施 | Technical foundation |
| Integration | 整合 | 整合 | System integration |
| API | API | API | Application programming interface |
| Analytics | 分析 | 分析 | Data analysis |
| Dashboard | 儀表板 | 仪表板 | Control panel |

## Company Names & Proper Nouns

**Keep in English:**
- Mezzofy
- ParknShop
- Maxims Group
- Jardine Restaurant Group
- Forbes China
- EJINSIGHT
- CIO World

**Mixed (as appears in original):**
- 百佳 (ParknShop in Chinese context)

## Numbers & Formatting

**Preserve as-is:**
- Percentages: 30-34%, 15-20%, 80%
- Currency: HK$0.20, USD $2M
- Multipliers: 5x, 3x
- Counts: 240 locations, 200+ stores

## HTML Formatting

**Preserve HTML tags in translations:**
```html
<span class="font-semibold text-primary-orange">5x higher</span>
<strong>keyword</strong>
<a href="..." class="...">link text</a>
```

## Translation Style Guide

### Tone
- **Professional**: Business-to-business communication
- **Clear**: Direct and easy to understand
- **Positive**: Emphasize benefits and solutions

### Sentence Structure
- **Traditional Chinese (zh-TW)**: More formal, traditional characters
- **Simplified Chinese (zh-CN)**: Simplified characters, mainland China conventions

### Consistency Rules
1. Use the same term for the same concept throughout all articles
2. Maintain HTML formatting (spans, links, strong tags)
3. Keep proper nouns in English unless there's a standard Chinese name
4. Numbers, percentages, and currency should match the English version exactly
5. Preserve line breaks and paragraph structure

## Common Phrases

| English | Traditional Chinese (zh-TW) | Simplified Chinese (zh-CN) |
|---------|----------------------------|---------------------------|
| "The platform highlights..." | 該平台強調... | 该平台强调... |
| "The service suits..." | 該服務適合... | 该服务适合... |
| "Several advantages" | 幾個優勢 | 几个优势 |
| "Typical obstacles" | 典型障礙 | 典型障碍 |

## Usage Notes

1. **Before translating a new article**, review this glossary for consistent terminology
2. **When encountering a new term**, add it to this glossary for future reference
3. **For ambiguous terms**, check existing translated articles for precedent
4. **Update this glossary** when adding new terms or correcting existing ones

## Version History

- **v1.0** (2026-02-16): Initial glossary created from pilot article (nfc-parknshop)
